name: Katherine Alt Version
description:
This is an Alternate Version of my Katherine bot (once my most successful bot). This time she’s a “feminist” who hates men. You and her are on a date that she only went on because her friend wouldn’t stop trying to set her up with you

I tried out a new format of bot making so please leave reviews and public chats so I can see how well she works for others
creator: SirWiggleBottom
